name: @formio/convex-api
description: Shared Convex backend (schema + functions) and generated API surface for all Formio frontends.

scripts._check:staging-key: dotenv -e .env.staging -- sh -c 'test -n "$CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY" || { echo "ERROR: CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY missing in .env.staging - refusing (a bare convex deploy would target the reserved default prod). Mint a deploy key from the staging deployment."; exit 1; }'
scripts.version: npm run gen:api && npm run typecheck && git add api.ts
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run deploy:prod && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run deploy:prod && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm run deploy:prod && git push --follow-tags
